Spring Data Redis
  1. org.springframework.data.redis.connection.stream
  2. StreamOffset

Uses of Class
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.stream.StreamOffset

Packages that use StreamOffset
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.redis.connection
Connection package providing low-level abstractions for interacting with the various Redis 'drivers'/libraries.
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.stream
Data structures and interfaces to interact with Redis Streams.
org.springframework.data.redis.core
Core package for integrating Redis with Spring concepts.
org.springframework.data.redis.stream

  • Uses of StreamOffset in org.springframework.data.redis.connection.stream

    Methods in org.springframework.data.redis.connection.stream that return StreamOffset
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <K> StreamOffset<K>
    StreamOffset.create(K stream, ReadOffset readOffset)
    Create a StreamOffset given key and ReadOffset.
    static <K> StreamOffset<K>
    StreamOffset.from(Record<K,?> reference)
    Create a StreamOffset from the given record id as reference to create the ReadOffset.from(String).
    static <K> StreamOffset<K>
    StreamOffset.fromStart(K stream)
    Create a StreamOffset given stream starting at ReadOffset#from("0-0").
    static <K> StreamOffset<K>
    StreamOffset.latest(K stream)
    Create a StreamOffset given key starting at ReadOffset.latest().
